evidence: Provenance is caller-supplied, and absent ApprovalGate a side-effecting call proceeds whenever that boolean is false.

method: full-file source trace and existing unit tests
evidence: 53 crate tests passed; lib.rs:1098-1164 protects only explicit untrusted=true while lib.rs:1230-1247 confirms false with no inbox executes.

source: Untrusted model/tool content influences a ToolCall while the integration constructs InvokeContext.
closest_control: Optional approval plus unauthenticated caller provenance metadata.
sink_or_broken_control: ToolExecutor::execute for a side-effecting registered tool.
impact: Unreviewed privileged mutation when taint is omitted or misclassified.

preconditions: approval gate absent or provenance misassigned
steps: default branch admits the side effect
attack_path.closest_control_failure: trust is asserted rather than derived
attack_path.impact_path: model intent becomes privileged tool action
